title: AI Agent Loop is Here. And it Changes Everything - Here's How.
summary: Cyril Imhof presents a video overview on AI agent loops, covering Fable 5 versus Mythos 5 models, loop engineering and recursive self-improvement techniques, memory systems for long-running tasks, and emerging opportunities in agentic payments and AI builders.
writeup: Cyril Imhof surveys AI agent loops and the engineering that sustains them. The video compares the Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, covers loop engineering and recursive self-improvement techniques, and explains memory systems built for long-running tasks. It also maps emerging opportunities in agentic payments and tooling for AI builders.
